pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.416) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Quality. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Quality roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm AI/ML Engineering is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Quality. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Quality competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.416) and edge-domain placement (AI/ML Engineering) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Quality. All passes support exclusion.
